title: Department Manager Vacancy at Godrej Interio - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Godrej Interio - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Interio are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Interio:
Godrej Interio is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Interio!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
